## Five-layer plan (see CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] `rationale/<name>/design.md` (+ `design.zh-CN.md`)
- [ ] `evaluate/<name>-skill-eval-report.md` (+ `.zh-CN.md`)
- [ ] `outputexample/<name>/`
